line_99_var_keep_one_where_condition_108.pred_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Lines of treatment", "Trial phase", "Total sample size" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell' AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination' AND ("Lines of treatment" LIKE '%2%' OR "Lines of treatment" LIKE '%≥2%' OR "Lines of treatment" LIKE '%at least 2%' OR "Lines of treatment" LIKE '%>=2%');

line_99_var_relax_numeric_13.pred_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Monotherapy/combination", "Lines of treatment", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Type of combination", "Trial phase", "Total sample size" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell' AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination' AND ("Lines of treatment" LIKE '%1 prior%' OR "Lines of treatment" LIKE '%at least 1%' OR "Lines of treatment" LIKE '%≥1%' OR "Lines of treatment" LIKE '%1+' OR "Lines of treatment" LIKE '%prior line%' OR "Lines of treatment" LIKE '%previous line%');

line_9_var_keep_one_where_condition_2.pred_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Trial phase", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Bladder' AND "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria" = 'No' AND "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion" = 'No';
